title: Seed phrases written down by Infinex users: still zero
deployed_facts: Infinex accounts have never required a seed phrase
Recovery runs through passkey providers, not paper backups
The number of seed phrases users have had to write down since the account launched is zero
This number is not expected to change
metric: seed phrases written down by Infinex users
joke_angle: the metric is technically true, technically silly, and quietly the whole point. The chrome of a data card applied to the number that defines the product is the joke.
